sellers_note: ® Sea Breeze is a family owned and operated dealership that has been in business for over 45 years. Our business model is simple, we treat each and every customer the same way we would expect to be treated. Whether you're looking for a new or pre-owned car, Sea Breeze Ford can help!Each of our pre-owned cars and trucks undergoes the same 179 point inspection that Ford Motor Company requires for the Blue Advantage certification program, whether it is Gold Certified, Blue Certified or Value priced.You can purchase the vehicle with the Peace of Mind knowing that a Ford Factory trained technician has inspected the vehicle and brought it up to factory standards.In addition to our quality vehicles, we offer a transparent transaction, the price you see is the price of the vehicle. Unlike many dealerships we do not have any hidden fees such as an Internet Buying Fee, Prep/Delivery fee, Paint Protection Fee, Nitrogen in the Tires fee etc. Our $590 Dealer Doc Fee is the only fee we charge and is amongst the lowest in the state.If you want a quality pre-owned vehicle at a great price, in a friendly NO-PRESSURE environment, come to Seabreeze Ford, Where we offer Miles of Smiles!Our new inventory is packed with brand-new Ford cars, trucks, SUVs, and vans to match every driver's wants and needs. From tough trucks like the Ford F-150 and Ford Super Duty and sporty sedans like the Ford Mustang to spacious SUVs and work vans like the Ford Explorer, Ford Edge, and Ford Transit, we have something for every driver to enjoy. We can also help you with your own custom order if you'd prefer. Call Anton Schmelz at 866-450-9523 to get all available internet specials! Note: Posted Internet Pricing is valid for Internet Customers when purchasing through our Internet Department and does not reflect the pricing at our brick and mortar location. All Internet Customers must identify themselves as so upon arrival at the dealership.
